title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec to v1.2.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec) | `v1.2.0` -> `v1.2.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fruntime-spec/v1.2.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fruntime-spec/v1.2.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fruntime-spec/v1.2.0/v1.2.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fruntime-spec/v1.2.0/v1.2.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/runtime-spec (github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec)</summary>

### [`v1.2.1`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/releases/tag/v1.2.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/compare/v1.2.0...v1.2.1)

This is the first patch release of the v1.2.z series of the Open
Container Initative Runtime Specification. It primarily includes a
series of minor fixes as well as new support for the specification of
the CPU affinity of container processes.

##### Additions

-   zos updates ([#​1273](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1273))
-   Add support for windows CPU affinity ([#​1258](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1258))
-   specs-go: sync SCMP_ARCH_\* constants with libseccomp main ([#​1229](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1229))
-   Add CPU affinity to executed processes ([#​1253](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1253), [#​1261](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1261))
-   config-linux: describe the format of cpus and mems ([#​1253](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1253))

##### Minor fixes

-   Fix description of errnoRet in Seccomp ([#​1277](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1277))
-   config-linux: update for libseccomp v2.6.0 ([#​1276](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1276))
-   Correct `prestart` hook description in summary ([#​1275](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1275))

##### Documentation, CI & Governance

-   ci: Add a github actions workflow for lint ([#​1257](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1257))
-   update http links to https ([#​1269](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1269))
-   doc: fix the invalid hyperlink naming-a-volume ([#​1268](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1268))
-   ci: remove redundunt actions ([#​1256](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1256))
-   chore: format JSON file `make -C schema fmt` ([#​1255](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1255))
-   CODEOWNERS: remove vbatts ([#​1248](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1248))
-   MAINTAINERS: move vbatts to EMERITUS ([#​1248](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1248))
-   Update golangci-lint to v1.56.1 in CI ([#​1245](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1245))
-   Add Go v1.21 and v1.22 to GitHub Actions CI matrix ([#​1245](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1245))
-   Update GitHub Actions packages to resolve warnings in CI ([#​1244](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1244))

Thanks to the following contributors for making this release possible:

-   Akihiro Suda <akihiro.suda.cz@hco.ntt.co.jp>
-   Austin Vazquez <macedonv@amazon.com>
-   Kaita Nakamura <kaita.nakamura0830@​gmail.com>
-   Kershaw Mehta <kershaw@us.ibm.com>
-   Kijima Daigo <norimaking777@​gmail.com>
-   Kir Kolyshkin <kolyshkin@gmail.com>
-   Kirtana Ashok <kiashok@microsoft.com>
-   Lei Wang <ssst0n3@​gmail.com>
-   Neil Johnson <najohnsn@us.ibm.com>
-   Patrickuuuu <hank93513@​gmail.com>
-   Sebastiaan van Stijn <github@gone.nl>
-   Tianon Gravi <admwiggin@gmail.com>
-   Toru Komatsu <k0ma@utam0k.jp>
-   Vincent Batts <vbatts@hashbangbash.com>

Vote-Results: +8 -0 \*3 ([#​1278](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1278))
Signed-off-by: Aleksa Sarai <cyphar@cyphar.com>

</details>
